arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals phone call with Pep Guardiola before beating Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arteta said he would not have been leading the Gunners at the Bernabeu were it not for Guardiola

arts.ttl: What Vinicius Jr did on the pitch when Bukayo Saka went to shake his hand after Arsenal beat Real Madrid last night
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s dream of turning things around against Arsenal were crushed at the Santiago Bernabeu. The Galacticos had to overturn a 3-0 deficit to beat...

arts.ttl: Greg Taylor told the Kieran Tierney extra dimension he brings to the table, Carter-Vickers gets big licks - Celtic news bulletin
arts.sum: It's your morning news from the Hoops all in one place

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti admits he could be sacked by Real Madrid imminently after Arsenal defeat
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti is coming under increasing pressure at Real Madrid, but the veteran Italian boss was full of praise for Arsenal after the Gunners' superb win in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Thursday's Transfer Talk Update: Neymar, Kylian Mbappe, Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand's U-turn on Bukayo Saka is complete after admission during Real Madrid display
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka starred as Arsenal beat Real Madrid 5-1 on aggregate in the quarter-finals of the Champions League and Rio Ferdinand has now dubbed the winger world-class

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka confronted by Real Madrid star near tunnel in heated moment
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s Dani Carvajal grabbed Saka by the back of the neck as he tried to walk down the tunnel

arts.ttl: Arsenal already have Champions League semi-final advantage vs PSG after major boost
arts.sum: The Eagles were due to visit Arsenal the weekend before the Champions League semi-final first leg but that game was rearranged to the Wednesday beforehand because of Palace's Wembley semi-final against Aston Villa. The Gunners booked their spot in the semi-finals of the Champions League thanks to a comfortable 5-1 aggregate victory over Real Madrid in the quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Thibaut Courtois aims subtle dig at Kylian Mbappe as he names surprise player that Real Madrid missed in Champions League defeat by Arsenal
arts.sum: Thibaut Courtois appeared to aim a subtle dig at Kylian Mbappe after Real Madrid were dumped out of the Champions League by Arsenal on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: 'I hope': Mikel Arteta reveals the message Carlo Ancelotti told him after Arsenal beat Real Madrid
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has revealed what Carlo Ancelotti told him about Arsenal’s Champions League campaign after they eliminated Real Madrid. Arsenal reached their first Champions League...
